---
pagetitle: "Projects — Yash Tiwari"
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     NAVBAR — identical across all pages.
     EDIT NAV LINKS HERE if you rename pages.
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<header class="navbar">
  <a href="index.html" class="nav-logo">YT.</a>

  <nav class="nav-links">
    <a href="index.html"    class="nav-link">Home</a>
    <a href="projects.html" class="nav-link">Projects</a>
    <a href="resume.html"   class="nav-link">Resume</a>
    <a href="about.html"    class="nav-link">About</a>
  </nav>

  <div class="nav-right">
    <a href="https://github.com/rsm-ytiwari" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="nav-icon" aria-label="GitHub">
      <svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <path d="M9 19c-5 1.5-5-2.5-7-3m14 6v-3.87a3.37 3.37 0 0 0-.94-2.61c3.14-.35 6.44-1.54 6.44-7A5.44 5.44 0 0 0 20 4.77 5.07 5.07 0 0 0 19.91 1S18.73.65 16 2.48a13.38 13.38 0 0 0-7 0C6.27.65 5.09 1 5.09 1A5.07 5.07 0 0 0 5 4.77a5.44 5.44 0 0 0-1.5 3.78c0 5.42 3.3 6.61 6.44 7A3.37 3.37 0 0 0 9 18.13V22"/>
      </svg>
    </a>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/yash-tiwari-here/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="nav-icon" aria-label="LinkedIn">
      <svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <path d="M16 8a6 6 0 0 1 6 6v7h-4v-7a2 2 0 0 0-2-2 2 2 0 0 0-2 2v7h-4v-7a6 6 0 0 1 6-6z"/>
        <rect x="2" y="9" width="4" height="12"/><circle cx="4" cy="4" r="2"/>
      </svg>
    </a>
    <button class="nav-icon" aria-label="Search">
      <svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65"/>
      </svg>
    </button>
    <button class="theme-pill" id="theme-toggle" aria-label="Toggle theme">
      <span id="theme-icon">
        <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
          <path d="M21 12.79A9 9 0 1 1 11.21 3 7 7 0 0 0 21 12.79z"/>
        </svg>
      </span>
      <span id="theme-label">Dark</span>
    </button>
  </div>
</header>


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     FEATURED BANNER
     EDIT BANNER HERE — change the title and subtitle freely.
     The label ("Work") is a small uppercase tag above the title.
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page-banner">
  <!-- EDIT LABEL -->
  <div class="banner-label">Work</div>

  <!-- EDIT TITLE -->
  <h1 class="banner-title">All Projects</h1>

  <!-- EDIT SUBTITLE -->
  <p class="banner-sub">
    ML pipelines, product analytics, and agentic systems — built
    to drive measurable business outcomes, not just to demo well.
  </p>
</div>
<!-- ── END BANNER ── -->


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     FULL PROJECTS GRID
     EDIT PROJECTS HERE — to add a new project:
       1. Duplicate one .p-card block below
       2. Update the number, year, title, desc, tags, and href
       3. Create the matching projects/yourproject.qmd file
          (duplicate projects/traway.qmd as a starting point)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="projects-section">
  <div class="cards-grid">

    <!-- PROJECT 01 — EDIT HERE -->
    <div class="p-card">
      <div class="p-preview"><span>Project Preview</span></div>
      <div class="p-body">
        <div class="p-meta">
          <span class="p-num">01</span>
          <span class="p-year">2026</span>
        </div>
        <div class="p-title">Intuit QuickBooks Upsell Targeting</div>
        <div class="p-desc">
          Profit-maximizing ML ensemble ranked #1 of 60 teams. Engineered features on
          75K structured records, built and tuned Logistic Regression, Random Forest,
          XGBoost, and MLP models, then scaled predictions to 800K+ population.
        </div>
        <div class="p-tags">
          <span class="p-tag">Python</span>
          <span class="p-tag">XGBoost</span>
          <span class="p-tag">Scikit-learn</span>
          <span class="p-tag">GLM</span>
          <span class="p-tag">MLP</span>
        </div>
        <a href="projects/intuit.html" class="p-more">Read more →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- END PROJECT 01 -->

    <!-- PROJECT 02 — EDIT HERE -->
    <div class="p-card">
      <div class="p-preview"><span>Project Preview</span></div>
      <div class="p-body">
        <div class="p-meta">
          <span class="p-num">02</span>
          <span class="p-year">2026</span>
        </div>
        <div class="p-title">Customer Message Optimization (NPTB)</div>
        <div class="p-desc">
          End-to-end ML pipeline on ~600K customer-email rows using Python and Polars.
          XGBoost final model achieved €0.84/customer and +51.3% uplift vs random
          — ~€1.42M projected at 5M customers.
        </div>
        <div class="p-tags">
          <span class="p-tag">Python</span>
          <span class="p-tag">Polars</span>
          <span class="p-tag">XGBoost</span>
          <span class="p-tag">MLP</span>
          <span class="p-tag">Uplift</span>
        </div>
        <a href="projects/nptb.html" class="p-more">Read more →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- END PROJECT 02 -->

    <!-- PROJECT 03 — EDIT HERE -->
    <div class="p-card">
      <div class="p-preview"><span>Project Preview</span></div>
      <div class="p-body">
        <div class="p-meta">
          <span class="p-num">03</span>
          <span class="p-year">2024</span>
        </div>
        <div class="p-title">Traway Operations Analytics</div>
        <div class="p-desc">
          Cohort and pricing analysis for a student-led mobility startup across
          3,200 customers. Applied segmentation and regression to improve retention
          to 60%+ and achieve 3× increase in AOV.
        </div>
        <div class="p-tags">
          <span class="p-tag">Python</span>
          <span class="p-tag">SQL</span>
          <span class="p-tag">Regression</span>
          <span class="p-tag">EDA</span>
          <span class="p-tag">Cohort Analysis</span>
        </div>
        <a href="projects/traway.html" class="p-more">Read more →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- END PROJECT 03 -->

    <!-- ── ADD NEW PROJECTS BELOW THIS LINE ────────────────
         Duplicate the block below and fill in your details.
    ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->

    <!-- PROJECT 04 — DUPLICATE THIS BLOCK FOR A NEW PROJECT
    <div class="p-card">
      <div class="p-preview"><span>Project Preview</span></div>
      <div class="p-body">
        <div class="p-meta">
          <span class="p-num">04</span>
          <span class="p-year">2026</span>
        </div>
        <div class="p-title">Your Project Title</div>
        <div class="p-desc">One or two line description of the project and its impact.</div>
        <div class="p-tags">
          <span class="p-tag">Tool 1</span>
          <span class="p-tag">Tool 2</span>
        </div>
        <a href="projects/yourproject.html" class="p-more">Read more →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    -->
    <!-- ── END NEW PROJECT TEMPLATE ── -->

  </div><!-- /cards-grid -->
</div>
<!-- ── END PROJECTS GRID ── -->


<!-- Toast (shared element for clipboard feedback) -->
<div class="toast" id="toast">✓ Copied to clipboard</div>
```
